label: Sweep 扫掠
description: 将 profile 沿 3D 路径扫掠。默认兼容旧行为；align=true 或 spline 会让截面沿路径切向旋转。何时用：把一个截面沿曲线扫出实体（线缆/把手/弯管的外形/型材），primitive 拼不出沿曲线变化的体。⚠️ align/spline 模式产出三角网格(mesh)，不能作为布尔运算(g_union/g_difference/g_intersection)的输入——布尔仅支持实体(solid) shape。
description-en: Sweep a profile along a 3D path. Defaults to legacy XY sections; align/spline enables tangent-oriented mesh sweep. Use when: sweeping a section along a curve (cable/handle/bent-tube body/extruded profile) — primitives cannot follow a curve. WARNING: the align/spline mesh output CANNOT be fed into boolean ops (g_union/g_difference/g_intersection), which only accept solid shapes.

inputs.name: geometry
inputs.label: 几何
inputs.description: 上游 Geometry（必须含 profile_id 所指 profile）
inputs.description-en: Upstream Geometry; must contain the profile referenced by profile_id.

inputs.name: profile_id
inputs.label: Profile id
inputs.description: 要扫掠的截面 profile id；从上游 Profile 节点的 id 输出连入
inputs.description-en: Id of the section profile to sweep. Feed from an upstream Profile node's `id` output.

inputs.name: path
inputs.label: 路径点
inputs.description: 扁平 3D 点列 [x1,y1,z1,x2,y2,z2,...]，至少两点
inputs.description-en: Flat 3D point list [x1,y1,z1,x2,y2,z2,...], at least two points.

inputs.name: spline
inputs.label: 样条
inputs.description-en: polyline, catmull_rom, or bezier path interpolation.

inputs.name: samples_per_segment
inputs.label: 每段采样
inputs.description: 样条每段的采样数（越大越光滑）

inputs.name: align
inputs.label: 沿路径切向旋转
inputs.description: true = 截面随路径切向旋转（mesh 扫掠）
inputs.description-en: true = rotate the section along the path tangent (mesh sweep).

inputs.name: closed
inputs.label: 闭合路径
inputs.description-en: true = close the path into a loop.

inputs.name: cap
inputs.label: 封端
inputs.description-en: true = cap the ends into a solid.

inputs.name: up_hint
inputs.label: 上方向提示
inputs.description: 构造扫掠截面朝向的 3D 向量 [x,y,z]
inputs.description-en: 3D up vector [x,y,z] used to orient the swept section.

inputs.name: id
inputs.label: id
inputs.description: 本结果的自定义 id；空 = 自动 sweep{n}

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 追加扫掠实体后的 Geometry
outputs.description-en: Geometry after appending the swept solid.

outputs.name: id
outputs.label: id
outputs.description: 本行 shape 的 id（供下游引用）；引用/路径错误时为空串
outputs.description-en: Id of the new shape (for downstream refs). Empty string when the ref or path was invalid.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: 错误
outputs.description: profile_id 缺失/找不到或 path 不合法时的原因；非空表示未追加任何几何，批次仍可能报 ok，务必读取
outputs.description-en: Reason when profile_id is missing/not found or path is invalid. Non-empty means nothing was appended even though the batch may report ok — always read it.
